title: taraxacum brachylepis
intro: Taraxacum brachylepis, also known as the small-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and its use as a diuretic to help reduce inflammation and improve kidney function. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as kidney stones and certain types of cancer. Taraxacum brachylepis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to provide relief from various health concerns.
